source_pr.title: plan: join's default value length should be changed when do column pruning.
source_pr.body: After column pruning, the `LogicalJoin.DefaultValues` may not be expected, and cause bug when do merge join

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t, t1) */ t.a, t1.b from t right join t t1 on t.a = t1.b order by t.a").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil> 2")) (executor/merge_join_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t, t1) */ t.a, t1.b from t right join t t1 on t.a = t1.b order by t.a").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil> 2")) (executor/merge_join_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t, t1) */ t.a, t1.b from t right join t t1 on t.a = t1.b order by t.a").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil> 2")) (executor/merge_join_test.go)
